paragraphs: I am a Computer Science graduate focused on building practical software solutions that combine modern web development with data-driven decision making.

My interests span full-stack engineering, backend APIs, AI-assisted applications, and analytics. I enjoy transforming real-world problems into scalable products while continuously learning new technologies.

timeline.title: Started B.Tech
timeline.desc: Began Computer Science & Engineering degree, focusing on core software engineering principles, algorithms, and databases.

timeline.title: Web Developer Internship
timeline.desc: Interned at Innobyte Services. Overhauled a commercial website for a fully responsive mobile-first experience.

timeline.title: AI Internship
timeline.desc: Interned at Infosys Springboard. Developed an AST-parsed Python docstring generator integrated with LLMs.

timeline.title: Healthcare AI Platform
timeline.desc: Created Doc-AI, an 8-screen React/Flask diagnosis system with 10+ REST endpoints and CNN triage.

timeline.title: Personal Finance System
timeline.desc: Engineered an SQLite-driven transaction management platform with normalized schemas and SQL reporting.

timeline.title: Java Full Stack & Analytics
timeline.desc: Expanding expertise into Java Spring Boot microservices, advanced Power BI reporting, and big data tools.

bullets: Docstring Generator: Created an end-to-end tool parsing Python files and feeding function context to LLMs.
AST Parsing: Leveraged Python's abstract syntax tree (AST) module to detect function boundaries, decorators, and variables.
LLM APIs: Implemented rate-limited API pipelines with fallback states for large code bases.
ML Workflows: Structured text parsing and code generation loops for automatic Google & NumPy style formats.
Responsive Website: Overhauled layout grids to ensure fluid scaling across small, medium, and ultra-wide devices.
UI Improvement: Standardized spacing, colors, and button hover states to reduce visual clutter.
Performance Optimization: Compressed media files and deferred script loading, resulting in a significantly faster first-paint speed.

education.school: Guru Gobind Singh Educational Society's Technical Campus, Bokaro

testimonials.quote: Ashish demonstrated exceptional problem-solving skills in integrating LLMs with AST parsing. His work on the docstring tool is highly innovative.
testimonials.author: Mentorship Lead

testimonials.quote: A self-motivated developer. Ashish redesigned our client interface ahead of schedule, showing great attention to responsive styling and performance details.
testimonials.author: Technical Supervisor
